mapper.sql: select dept_id, repair_id, repair_no, device_id, device_name, device_ip, fault_description, original_responsible, original_phone, current_responsible, current_phone, status, transfer_from, transfer_to, transfer_reason, repair_result, repair_time, complete_token, photo_before, photo_after, has_parts, parts_desc, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark from iot_device_repair
mapper.insert: insert into iot_device_repair ( dept_id, repair_no, device_id, device_name, device_ip, fault_description, original_responsible, original_phone, current_responsible, current_phone, status, transfer_from, transfer_to, transfer_reason, complete_token, create_by, create_time, remark ) values ( #{deptId}, #{repairNo}, #{deviceId}, #{deviceName}, #{deviceIp}, #{faultDescription}, #{originalResponsible}, #{originalPhone}, #{currentResponsible}, #{currentPhone}, #{status}, #{transferFrom}, #{transferTo}, #{transferReason}, #{completeToken}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{remark} )
insert into iot_parts_usage (repair_id, part_id, part_name, quantity, used_by, used_time, create_time) values (#{repairId}, 0, #{partName}, 1, #{usedBy}, sysdate(), sysdate())
mapper.select: select current_responsible as "name", count(*) as "total", sum(case when status = 'COMPLETED' then 1 else 0 end) as "completed", sum(case when status in ('PENDING','ASSIGNED','ACCEPTED') then 1 else 0 end) as "inProgress", sum(case when status = 'REJECTED' then 1 else 0 end) as "rejected" from iot_device_repair group by current_responsible order by total desc
